what_happened: Added release metadata capture and artifact upload to deploy-production.yml
why: Task required a structured JSON artifact capturing version, commitRef, buildTimestamp, validationOutcomes, workflow, and runId after successful health checks
fix_applied: Inserted two steps between Post Success and Capture Error Context: one using jq -n with --arg flags to build the JSON and write to release-metadata.json, and one using SHA-pinned actions/upload-artifact@v4.6.2
pattern_to_remember: In deploy-production.yml, metadata/artifact steps that should only run on the success path go between 'Post Success' (line ~452) and 'Capture Error Context' (which is failure-only). Use `if: success() && steps.diff.outputs.has_changes == 'true'` to gate on both success and actual deploy. Use `jq -n --arg key value '{ key: $key }'` pattern for safe JSON construction in bash (avoids shell injection and quoting issues).
